---
title: "Lee, Ashley_W11-Hands-on Practice Assignment"
author: "Ashley Lee"
format: html
editor: visual
---

1.  The URL of the website on Netlify: <https://alweek11assignment.netlify.app/>

2.  The URL of the website on the Github repo, which should include all files you created: <https://github.com/ashleyxlee/m10-assignment-website>

::: callout-note
I named Github repo as Week 10, when it should have been Week 11. I was unable to change the URL.
:::
